Detected Solution Path

  1. Defeat Executor.

Quest Text

Description

The Aureus seem to rebuild their motherships at extreme speeds...it's a marvel that they can still function as an army. Defeat the Executor, kill off their high command and see if that cripples them.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
